content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.worker_broadcaster
FILE: cosmos/core/worker_broadcaster.py (444 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Worker Broadcaster - Shares worker progress with the swarm chat
Workers announce what they are building every 2-3 minutes with code snippets

CLASSES:
- WorkerBroadcaster: Broadcasts worker progress to the swarm chat
  Methods: async def start(self, swarm_manager)
  Methods: async def stop(self)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_broadcaster() -> WorkerBroadcaster
- async def start_broadcaster(swarm_manager)
